intent: an identity site for a mid-century industrial design consultancy, corporate-grade brand presentation

deltas: Replace Graphik with a freely available geometric grotesque that reads with equivalent authority — swap body family to Inter 400 (imported from Google Fonts), updating both DESIGN.md typography.body.family and the composition.html @import/variable fallbacks accordingly.

turn_log.delta: Replace Graphik with a freely available geometric grotesque that reads with equivalent authority — swap body family to Inter 400 (imported from Google Fonts), updating both DESIGN.md typography.body.family and the composition.html @import/variable fallbacks accordingly.
turn_log.rationale: DESIGN.md declares Graphik as the body family but it is a proprietary commercial font unavailable via Google Fonts or free CDNs, meaning the HTML will fall back to Helvetica Neue/Arial — undermining the claimed typographic authority and contradicting the prose promise.
